creator: nbe@renzel.net
text:
Now built "devel/libantlr3c" with "CONFIGURE_ARGS= --enable-debuginfo" in the Makefile and "make -DWITH_DEBUG reinstall" which gives more details:
===============================================================================
(gdb) bt
#0  0x0000000806181610 in memmove () from /lib/libc.so.7
#1  0x000000080cd539fd in newPtr8 (factory=<value optimized out>, ptr=0xfd01940 <Address 0xfd01940 out of bounds>, size=1) at src/antlr3string.c:494
#2  0x000000080cd55509 in toStringSS (ts=0x80fc58e40, start=<value optimized out>, stop=<value optimized out>) at src/antlr3tokenstream.c:569
#3  0x0000000805c9bf7f in belle_sip_messageParserNewSSD () from /usr/local/lib/libbellesip.so.0
#4  0x0000000805c9b77f in belle_sip_messageParserNewSSD () from /usr/local/lib/libbellesip.so.0
#5  0x0000000805c8fd35 in belle_sip_messageParserNewSSD () from /usr/local/lib/libbellesip.so.0
#6  0x0000000805c8fa1a in belle_sip_messageParserNewSSD () from /usr/local/lib/libbellesip.so.0
#7  0x0000000805c8f937 in belle_sip_messageParserNewSSD () from /usr/local/lib/libbellesip.so.0

#9  0x00000008017c8630 in sal_address_new () from /usr/local/lib/liblinphone.so.6
#10 0x00000008017ad51f in linphone_address_new () from /usr/local/lib/liblinphone.so.6
#11 0x000000080179d638 in linphone_core_set_primary_contact () from /usr/local/lib/liblinphone.so.6
